ec2.spotfleet.vcpucountrangerequest.CfnA: The minimum and maximum number of vCPUs.

ec2.spotfleet.vcpucountrangerequest.Max.Description: The maximum number of vCPUs. To specify no maximum limit, omit this parameter.

ec2.spotfleet.vcpucountrangerequest.Min.Description: The minimum number of vCPUs. To specify no minimum limit, specify `0`.
